posts.caption:
Buying a second home? Don't forget the ABSD. 😬

On a $1.65M purchase, a Singapore citizen pays about $330k in Additional Buyer's Stamp Duty — on top of the price. Most people only find out when it's too late.

Work out your exact stamp duty, free — link in bio.

#singaporeproperty #absd #stampduty #propertyinvestment #sgproperty #propertysg
posts.alt: Stamp duty — ABSD on a second home

posts.caption:
Selling for $1.65M? Here's what actually lands in your pocket. 👇

After your outstanding loan, your CPF refund (with accrued interest) and agent + legal fees, you'd walk away with about $879k — not $1.65M. Know your real number before you list.

Free net-proceeds tool — link in bio.

(Example figures — your own numbers will differ.)

#singaporeproperty #sellingyourhome #cpf #propertysg #sgproperty

Myth: "Everyone pays extra stamp duty when they buy."

A Singapore citizen pays 0% ABSD on their first home. It only starts from your second property.

Know the real rules before you start house-hunting.

See what you actually need, free — link in bio.

#singaporeproperty #propertytips #homebuying101 #sgproperty #propertysg

Sellers are quietly winning in Clementi 📈

The median resale flat there is now $598k — up 3.9% over the year, across 713 sales. If you're holding here, you've got leverage. If you're buying, move with your eyes open.

The full read on what it means for your move is on the site — link in bio.

#singaporeproperty #clementi #hdbresale #sgpropertymarket #propertysg #sghome

You might be leaving money on the table. 👀

First-timer families can receive up to $80k from the CPF Housing Grant alone — and that's before EHG, Proximity or EC grants stack on top. Most buyers never check what they actually qualify for.

Check your grants in 30 seconds, free — link in bio.

#singaporeproperty #hdbgrants #firsthome #bto #sgproperty #propertysg

posts.caption:
Want priority at Haig Girls'? 📍

Live within 1km and your child gets first dibs in the P1 ballot — and right now 169+ homes qualify. See every one, and check any school, free.
